form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (21.65) in a Class 2 FIN, finishing a 1.5 lengths third. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from five starts. Follow up.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (21.93) in a Class 3, finishing a 9 length seventh. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (21.89) when fifth over 375m at this track in a Class 3. Has three successes and eight minors from 17 starts from box 5. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 375m at this track beaten 9 lengths (21.85) behind Iris Haze in a Class 3 on April 9. Should prove hard to beat.
